title: 100 Days of Projects
description: A personal challenge to build a new frontend project every day to improve HTML, CSS, and JavaScript skills.

title: Portfolio
description: My personal developer portfolio showcasing my projects, skills, and experience. Built with modern CSS and vanilla JavaScript.

description: An AI-powered tool that generates structured README files for GitHub repositories automatically from repo data.

title: Omnifood
description: A responsive food delivery landing page built during Jonas Schmedtmann's HTML5 & CSS3 course. Showcases modern responsive design principles.

title: NutriVision AI
description: A frontend-only nutrition tracking app that uses AI to analyze meals and provide macro breakdowns for health-conscious users.
